response.justification: The role requires 5–10 years of strong hands-on C++ development on Windows, plus SQL Server/Oracle experience and fixed-income or capital-markets domain knowledge. This candidate has only about six months of professional C/C++ work (National Instruments, 2014–2015) plus a university thesis, with no recent C++ and no Windows-platform focus. The core career is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web/mobile/embedded systems. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience (only SQL/MySQL/MongoDB) and no fixed-income, investment-banking, or capital-markets domain background. The mismatch on every mandatory requirement makes this a poor fit.
strengths: Long, broad engineering career with strong TDD/testing and CI/CD discipline
Some genuine C/C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI components and a C++ thesis project)
Strong communication, evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++, a decade ago; no recent or sustained C++ work
No SQL Server/Oracle and no fixed-income/capital-markets/investment-banking domain experience
No Windows-platform development focus; primary stack is JS/TS/Node and DLang
